name: project-operating-system
description: Meta-repo generator for Claude Code projects. Plugin: pos.

scripts.validate:profiles: tsx tools/validate-profile.ts questionnaire/profiles/nextjs-app.yaml && tsx tools/validate-profile.ts questionnaire/profiles/agent-sdk.yaml && tsx tools/validate-profile.ts questionnaire/profiles/cli-tool.yaml
scripts.validate:generator: tsx generator/run.ts --profile questionnaire/profiles/nextjs-app.yaml && tsx generator/run.ts --profile questionnaire/profiles/agent-sdk.yaml && tsx generator/run.ts --profile questionnaire/profiles/cli-tool.yaml
scripts.render:generator: tsx generator/run.ts --profile questionnaire/profiles/nextjs-app.yaml --dry-run && tsx generator/run.ts --profile questionnaire/profiles/agent-sdk.yaml --dry-run && tsx generator/run.ts --profile questionnaire/profiles/cli-tool.yaml --dry-run
